text.title: Flaky Test Elimination Worked Example
text.summary: One worked end-to-end example showing a Flaky Test Elimination artefact filled from a realistic input bundle. Trace runs from input brief → evidence gathering → schema fill → validator pass → review surfacing.

section.title: Scenario
section.p: A Vitest test fails 4x/week. Classification → non-determinism (uuid in snapshot). Fix → seed the uuid factory; regen snapshot. Verification → 50/50 pass isolated; CI 5/5 green. Flake tally drops by one.

list.item: Step 1 — prerequisites_ok=true; all input refs reachable.
Step 2 — evidence array populated with ≥1 citation per non-trivial field.
Step 4 — validator script exits 0; no violations.

section.title: Outcome
section.p: The artefact is auditable by a downstream reviewer without re-deriving the reasoning. Every non-trivial field traces back to an evidence row; rejected fields surface as structured skip-with-reason instead of polluting the library with degraded output.
